thought.text: It seems the Git configuration file doesn't contain any remote repository information either. Let me check if there's a GitHub URL in any other files or documentation.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "grep -r \"https://github.com\" /workspace/project", "is_input": "false", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Search for GitHub URLs in project files"}

summary: Search for GitHub URLs in project files
